examples: These words have fallen into desuetude.
Many words once commonly used have fallen into desuetude.
His boredom with life may be due to the desuetude of his brain power.
After all, housing and capital spending have wound down to near irreducible desuetude.
Monte Bello fell into desuetude during Prohibition, and a portion was replanted in the '40s by William Short, a Unitarian minister jailed as a conscientious objector throughout World War I.
